subject: [PATCH v6 01/15] mm: decouple protnone helpers from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING

2026-05-29.patch_summary: This patch decouples the protnone helpers (pte_protnone and pmd_protnone) from CONFIG_NUMA_BALANCING, making them available independently of NUMA balancing. The capability to detect present-but-inaccessible page table entries is useful beyond NUMA balancing and is now enabled on six architectures that support it. The patch introduces a new configuration option, CONFIG_ARCH_HAS_PTE_PROTNONE, which depends on the presence of protnone PTEs in an architecture's code. This change does not introduce any functional changes but rather makes the infrastructure available for other uses.
